goal: A cron checks the admin@/rice@ inboxes ~4x/day, classifies new mail (invoice/credit-note/voyage-summary) via the LLM, is idempotent, and STAGES save-attachment/record-finance/generate-invoice/record-voyage proposals into the existing confirm/undo action-stack -- never auto-executing a financial write.
why: This is the 'checks email 4x/day and presents what's ready' behavior -- the autonomous front-end of the M6 invoice/voyage pipeline whose confirm-and-execute back-end P2-P4 already shipped. P5 produces only cron + classification + staging; it ships independently.
success_criteria: A cron (/api/mail/scan/run, 0 */6 * * * in vercel.json, allowlisted in proxy.ts, CRON_SECRET-gated) runs ~4x/day.

The scan reads admin@aquavoy.com and rice@aquavoy.com, classifies each new message via the LLM (inboxClassifier, separate from briefing), and is idempotent on (mailbox, uid) via processed_messages (markProcessed commits BEFORE staging).

Financial messages (invoice / creditNote / voyageSummary) are staged as exactly ONE pending_actions row each (principal Wency, tool record_finance_entry / record_voyage_entry), surfacing automatically in the existing home-page action-stack via /api/actions.
The scan NEVER calls executeConfirmedAction -- no financial write happens without human confirmation (ADR-003).

A per-message error (classification failure, IMAP read error, staging failure) is caught, increments errors in ScanSummary, and never aborts the batch -- remaining messages in the same run still process.
processed_messages has RLS on, no policies (constitution); tsc clean; all new tests + proxy.test.ts pass.

tasks.title: Idempotency table + processedMessages store
acceptance_criteria: Migration 0018 creates processed_messages(id, mailbox, uid, message_id, category, processed_at) with UNIQUE(mailbox, uid), RLS enabled, no policies.
isAlreadyProcessed(mailbox, uid) returns true for a previously-marked pair and false otherwise.
markProcessed is safe to call twice for the same (mailbox, uid) -- second call does not throw (upsert onConflict mailbox,uid, ignoreDuplicates).
tasks.action: Write 0018_processed_messages.sql (columns + UNIQUE(mailbox,uid) + processed_at index + enable RLS + no policies + comment). Write processedMessages.ts exporting markProcessed (upsert onConflict 'mailbox,uid'), isAlreadyProcessed (maybeSingle on mailbox+uid), cleanupProcessed (delete older than N days). Write processedMessages.test.ts mocking @/lib/supabase/server.

tasks.title: Inbox classifier (separate from briefing.ts)
acceptance_criteria: classifyMessage({from, subject, body}) returns one of six InboxCategory literals (invoice | creditNote | voyageSummary | important | routine | spam).
A credit-note email classifies as creditNote, a voyage-details email as voyageSummary, a supplier invoice as invoice.
A malformed model reply degrades to 'routine' rather than throwing (mirrors briefing.ts defensive parse).
tasks.action: Write inboxClassifier.ts: import complete/ChatMessage/ChatOptions from @/lib/openrouter/client; export InboxCategory union + ClassifyInput; SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION (join newlines) asking for STRICT JSON {category}; classifyMessage builds messages, calls complete, parses defensively (strip fence, JSON.parse try/catch, validate literal), returns 'routine' on any failure. Write inboxClassifier.test.ts mocking @/lib/openrouter/client.

tasks.title: Scan orchestration (list -> classify -> markProcessed -> stage)
acceptance_criteria: runInboxScan lists recent mail from admin@aquavoy.com and rice@aquavoy.com via listEmails, and for each not-already-processed message: classifies, calls markProcessed BEFORE any stagePendingAction, and stages exactly one pending action for the three financial categories.
An already-processed (mailbox, uid) is skipped -- classifyMessage and stagePendingAction are NOT called for it.
Each staged action uses principal 'Wency' and the matching tool (record_finance_entry / record_voyage_entry); runInboxScan NEVER calls executeConfirmedAction.
runInboxScan returns a ScanSummary and per-message errors never abort the batch (per-message try/catch).
tasks.action: Write inboxScan.ts: import listEmails/readEmail, classifyMessage, markProcessed/isAlreadyProcessed, stagePendingAction. SCAN_PRINCIPAL='Wency', MAILBOXES=[admin@,rice@], FINANCIAL=[invoice,creditNote,voyageSummary]. runInboxScan loops mailboxes->listEmails->per-message try/catch: skip if processed; readEmail; classify; markProcessed BEFORE stage; stage ONE action per financial message; return ScanSummary. Never import executeConfirmedAction. Write inboxScan.test.ts mocking all collaborators.

tasks.title: Cron route + proxy allowlist + vercel.json schedule
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/mail/scan/run with Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET returns {ok:true,data:ScanSummary}; without/wrong token returns 401.
src/proxy.test.ts passes (locks vercel.json crons and allowlist in lock-step).
tasks.action: Write src/app/api/mail/scan/run/route.ts mirroring scheduled/run/route.ts: runtime nodejs, force-dynamic, CRON_SECRET bearer gate, ok(await runInboxScan()) / Sentry.captureException + fail on error. Edit src/proxy.ts: add '/api/mail/scan/run' to ALLOWLIST Set + doc comment bullet. Edit vercel.json: append {path:/api/mail/scan/run, schedule:'0 */6 * * *'} to crons.
